name: pi-captain
description: Captain — multi-agent pipeline orchestrator for pi. Define specialized agents, wire them into sequential/parallel/pool pipelines with quality gates, and run complex workflows.

scripts.line-limit: find extensions skills -name '*.ts' ! -name '*.test.ts' | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | awk '$1 > 200 && $2 != "total"' | grep -v node_modules
